text.message: Alr red and green, let's not gang rob me to death this time lol

U were going to rob me no matter what lol
U didnt say yes to nb lol
I dont really get why you want 4511 anyways
Sorry I didn’t see it.  I would’ve done it.

When youre on that many wood
Im not giving u 2 cards u dont produce for 1 card I do produce lol
Were both gonna get cooked orange lol

Quit being greedy. U make no sheep, I make a bunch of wheat
